name: Whole Wheat Bread Recipe (100%)
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Stone Ground Whole Wheat Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the whole wheat flour, gluten, and salt.
2. In the bread pan of your machine, pour in lukewarm water (110°F).
3. Sprinkle the yeast over the water.
4. Add honey to the water and stir with a spatula.
5. Pour the dry ingredients mixture into the bread pan.
6. With a spatula, gently fold the flour from each corner of the pan once.
7. Place the bread pan in your bread machine.
8. Select Bread from the menu on your machine.
9. Choose the desired color setting (light or dark).
10. Press Start and lock the settings.
This recipe is designed to be used in a bread machine for convenience.
